item.title: c语言和数据结构
item.description: # C++ [第一章_类与对象.md](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975279/_.md) # C [1. 关于课程.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975289/1.pdf) [2. C语言-1.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975290/2.C.-1.pdf) [2. C语言-2.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975292/2.C.-2.pdf) [2. C语言-3.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975294/2.C.-3.pdf) [2. C语言-4.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975300/2.C.-4.pdf) [2. C语言-5.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975301/2.C.-5.pdf) [2. C语言-6.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975302/2.C.-6.pdf) [第八章_指针.md](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975303/_.md) [第二章__数据类型、运算符与表达式.md](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975304/__.md) [第九章_结构与共用体.md](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975308/_.md) [第六章_数组.md](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975309/_.md) [第七章_函数.md](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975310/_.md) [第三章_c程序设计.md](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975311/_c.md) [第四章_顺序结构和选择结构程序设计.md](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975312/_.md) [第五章_循环控制.md](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975313/_.md) [第一章.md](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975314/default.md) # 数据结构 [Part1-1 什么是数据结构.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975327/Part1-1.pdf) [Part1-2 and 3 算法设计与分析.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975328/Part1-2.and.3.pdf) [Part2 排序.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975329/Part2.pdf) [Part2-1 插入排序.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975331/Part2-1.pdf) [Part2-2 选择排序.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975332/Part2-2.pdf) [Part2-3 交换排序.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975334/Part2-3.pdf) [Part2-4 and 5 and 6 归并排序-基数排序-内排分析.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975336/Part2-4.and.5.and.6.-.-.pdf) [Part3-1 静态查找.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975337/Part3-1.pdf) [Part3-2 动态查找(讲完二叉树之后讲）.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975338/Part3-2.pdf) [Part3-3 散列查找.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975341/Part3-3.pdf) [查找.md](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975343/default.md) [二叉树.md](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975344/default.md) [复习知识点.docx](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975346/default.docx) [复习知识点.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975347/default.pdf) [排序算法.md](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975349/default.md) [图.md](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975350/default.md) [线性表.md](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15975351/default.md) 。

item.title: 新高考基础知识梳理
item.description: [2024届高考数学复习知识梳理.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15974901/2024.pdf) [2024届青岛市静悟材料（数学）汇编.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15974902/2024.pdf) [2024年高考数学教材知识一遍过（课本内容回顾+知识清单+易错易混点+考前提醒）.docx](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/15974904/2024.%2B.%2B.%2B.docx)
